name: Nature
scope: Original research across all fields of science and technology with broad significance.

name: Science
scope: Original research and reviews across all scientific disciplines with broad impact.

name: The Lancet
scope: Clinical medicine, global health, and health policy with emphasis on clinical impact.

name: New England Journal of Medicine
scope: Clinical research, clinical practice, health policy, and medical education.

name: BMJ
scope: General medical journal covering clinical research, education, news, and commentary.

name: JAMA
scope: Clinical research, reviews, and opinion in medicine and health.

name: PLOS ONE
scope: Multidisciplinary research with sound methodology regardless of perceived significance.

name: Journal of Medical Ethics
scope: Medical ethics, bioethics, healthcare ethics, and related health law and policy.

name: Health Economics
scope: Economic analysis of health care systems, health policy, and health outcomes.

name: Value in Health
scope: Health economics, outcomes research, health technology assessment, and decision sciences.

name: PharmacoEconomics
scope: Pharmacoeconomic evaluation, drug pricing, cost-effectiveness, and health technology assessment.

name: Social Science & Medicine
scope: Social science perspectives on health, illness, and health care systems.
